philippines.title: Senate approves multi-faith prayer, quiet rooms bill on final reading
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines – The Senate has approved on third and final reading Senate Bill No. 1629, also known as the Multi-Faith Prayer and Quiet Rooms Act, marking a significant step toward promoting religious inclusivity and accommodation in public spaces. Authored by Sen. Mark Villar, the measure mandates the establishment of dedicated multi-faith prayer and quiet rooms in public offices and selected public-facing establishments across the country. Villar welcomed the bill’s approval, describing it as a “landmark measure” that recognizes and respects the diverse spiritual needs of Filipinos. The approval comes as Muslim communities around the world observe Ramadan, a period […]...
Keep on reading: Senate approves multi-faith prayer, quiet rooms bill on final reading

philippines.title: VCT Pacific Stage 1 Finals flies to Vietnam
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines – The Valorant Champions Tournament (VCT) Pacific Stage 1 Finals is set to take place in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam on May 15-17, 2026. The Finals can be watched live at Thiskyhall Sala Convention Center.  The VCT Stage 1 Finals will be held in Southeast Asia for the first time, which further expands live-event presence for esports players and fans across the Asia-Pacific region. Aside from VCT Stage 1 Finals, Southeast Asia has also hosted other major Valorant events such as Masters Bangkok 2025 held in Thailand and 2024 Ascension Tournament held in Indonesia.  In previous tournaments, […]...
Keep on reading: VCT Pacific Stage 1 Finals flies to Vietnam

CEBU CITY, Philippines — One of PMI Bohol Boxing Stable’s top prospects, Gerwin “Gladiator” Asilo, is now in Japan for his second stint, slated on April 12 in Osaka. Asilo, along with his trainer Romnic Hoybia, arrived in Japan yesterday, April 9, ahead of their pre-fight activities, including the official weigh-in this Saturday. The 25-year-old […]...

energy.title: Ukraine to Complete Druzhba Oil Pipeline Repairs This Spring
energy.description: Ukraine will complete in the spring repairs on the damaged oil pipeline Druzhba, which carries Russian oil to Hungary and Slovakia, according to Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. At the end of January, the Druzhba oil pipeline was damaged in what Ukraine said was a Russian drone attack. Supplies of Russian oil to Hungary and Slovakia, the last two remaining EU member states dependent on Russian crude flows via Druzhba, have been halted since January 27. “We will complete the repairs because that is the agreement. I told them we would…

energy.title: Gulf Producers Take First Steps Toward Resuming Hormuz Oil Flows
energy.description: The biggest oil producers in the Middle East are asking their Asian customers to submit cargo loading nominations for the export ports that require passage through the Strait of Hormuz, in a sign that the Gulf petrostates are taking tentative steps toward preparing for resumed oil flows through the chokepoint. Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, and Iraq are asking for loading nominations for April and May for cargoes that would have to eventually transit the Strait of Hormuz, sources familiar with the plans told Reuters on Friday. Despite the ceasefire announced…
